detailedDescription:
8GB of DDR3 memory.
A single stick for older platforms — sufficient for basic tasks and light gaming.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 8GB
Generation: DDR3
Bandwidth: Up to 14.9 GB/s
Voltage: 1.5V (1.35V for DDR3L)
Slots: 1 x 8GB
ECC Support: No (standard) / Yes (server variants)
Compatible Sockets: LGA1155, LGA1150, AM3, AM3+
